annotations.content:
The sun influences life in the oceans
just as it does on land.
The sun influences life in the oceans just as it does on land.

Its richest parts are those
where waves and currents
Its richest parts are those where waves and currents

bring fertilising nutrients to surface waters
that are bathed in sunlight.
bring fertilising nutrients to surface waters that are bathed in sunlight.
The seas off the Cape in South Africa
The seas off the Cape in South Africa
have this magic recipe and are hugely productive.
have this magic recipe and are hugely productive.

Summer is a time of plenty,
and it's now that the seals start to breed.
Summer is a time of plenty, and it's now that the seals start to breed.

The strike of a great white shark
lasts a mere second.
The strike of a great white shark lasts a mere second.

Slowing it down 40 times
reveals the technique and immense strength
Slowing it down 40 times reveals the technique and immense strength
If surprise fails, there will be a chase.
If surprise fails, there will be a chase.
The shark is faster on a straight course,
The shark is faster on a straight course,
but it can't turn as sharply as a seal.
but it can't turn as sharply as a seal.

Once the seals have finished breeding,
the giant sharks will move on.
Once the seals have finished breeding, the giant sharks will move on.

It's now becoming clear that great whites
migrate thousands of miles across the oceans
It's now becoming clear that great whites migrate thousands of miles across the oceans
to harvest seasonal abundances in different seas.
to harvest seasonal abundances in different seas.
